# Ngo Gia Huan

> Fullstack engineer in Ho Chi Minh City. Building Next.js products in TypeScript, with occasional detours into Sui blockchain.

- Name: Ngo Gia Huan (Ngô Gia Huấn)
- Role: Fullstack Engineer (Frontend / Backend / Web3)
- Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam (UTC+7)
- Site: https://huanngdev.site
- Email: huanngdev@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/huanngdev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/huanngdev/

## Stack

- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Move
- Frontend: Next.js (App Router, RSC, Server Actions), React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Node.js, REST/GraphQL APIs
- Blockchain: Sui, Move, Seal, Walrus
- Tooling: Turborepo, Bun, Vercel

## Availability

Open to full-time, freelance, and contract work — available immediately. Remote, on-site, or hybrid.
